OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
William Eugene Gilg, Esq. for plaintiff Roger Tonna, who is present.
Richard J. MacPalmer, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendants William Scranton, Von Scranton & Jackie Hamilton, who are all present.

This cause came on regularly for settlement conference this day. All parties were present as indicated above. Settlement discussions held. Case did not settle. Trial date of Nov-24-2008 remains.

JPT Nils Rosenquest, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)
